key_features: REST methods: get, post, put, delete
frontend/src/services/api.ts.error_handling: Try-catch with fallback for JSON parsing

frontend/src/App.tsx.content: Simple header + main layout using Tailwind classes

frontend/src/main.tsx.changes: Updated to import and render App component

architectural_patterns: Generic HTTP client for type-safe responses
code_practices: Conditional body serialization (body != null ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined)
Graceful error fallback in response parsing
design_decisions: Single API client singleton export pattern
RESTful method naming (get, post, put, delete)
Generic type parameters for flexible response typing

gotchas_discovered: ApiClientError parsing attempts JSON but silently catches exceptions - could mask parsing errors
BASE_URL defaults to '/api' if env var missing - implicit coupling to default path
All HTTP methods set Content-Type header even for DELETE (standard but worth noting)
No timeout handling on fetch calls - requests could hang indefinitely
No authentication token injection mechanism in API client
URLSearchParams type is Record<string, string> - doesn't allow non-string values
No request/response logging or debugging capabilities built-in

approach_details.scope: Foundation layer complete - types, API service, and entry point established

recommendations.item: Add authentication token handling to API client (Authorization header injection)
Implement request timeout handling to prevent indefinite hangs
Add request/response logging and debugging capabilities to api service
Implement exponential backoff retry logic for failed requests (5xx errors)
Strengthen URLSearchParams typing to handle non-string values or add validation
Consider adding request/response interceptor hooks for extensibility
Add more granular error types (NetworkError, ValidationError, NotFoundError, etc.)
